[{"text": "and we want to return true if", "code": ["class Solution:", "    def isAnagram(self, s: str, t: str) -> bool:", "        if len(s) != len(t):", "            return False"]}, {"text": "we're just going to be doing is counting the characters in both of the strings so", "code": ["countS, countT = {}, {}"]}, {"text": "both strings right", "code": ["for i in range(len(s)):"]}, {"text": "we're going to create hashmaps for that", "code": ["countS[s[i]] = 1 + countS.get(s[i], 0)", "countT[t[i]] = 1 + countT.get(t[i], 0)"]}, {"text": "then we can go ahead and return true that's the", "code": ["return countS == countT"]}, {"text": "make sure the counts are the same so let's", "code": ["return countS == countT"]}]
